title: Department Manager Vacancy at Hypercity - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Hypercity - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Hypercity is actively seeking a talented and motivated Department Manager to join our dynamic team in Kanpur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Hypercity:
Hypercity is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hypercity!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
